basic_details.job_title: GSSSB Additional Assistant Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 33 years Age Relaxation: Up to 10 years for General PwD male (max 43), 15 years for General PwD female (max 45), 15 years for Reserved PwD male (max 45), 20 years for Reserved PwD female (max 45)

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma in Engineering (Mechanical) or Diploma in Automobile, Basic knowledge of computer application, Adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi or both
qualification.details: Diploma in Engineering (Mechanical) or Diploma in Automobile obtained from Technical Examination Board or any of the Universities established or incorporated by or under the Central or State Act in India; or any other educational institutions recognised as such or declared to be deemed as University under Section-3 of the University Grants Commission Act, 1956. The basic knowledge of computer application as prescribed in the Gujarat Civil Services Classification, Recruitment (General) Rules, 1967. Adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi or both.

salary_details.details: Rs. 49600 - 126600 Per Month Rs. 49600/- per month for first 5 years

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of GSSSB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download GSSSB Additional Assistant Engineer (Mechanical), Class-3 Job 2026 Noti

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GSSSB Additional Assistant Engineer (Mechanical), Class-3 posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the GSSSB Additional Assistant Engineer (Mechanical), Class-3 recruitment is 20-06-2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum age requirement for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for candidates applying for the Additional Assistant Engineer (Mechanical), Class-3 posts is 18 years as of the specified date.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the GSSSB AAE (Mechanical) posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for General category candidates is 33 years. Age relaxations are applicable for reserved categories and persons with disabilities as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Diploma in Engineering (Mechanical) or Diploma in Automobile, along with basic computer knowledge and adequate knowledge of Gujarati or Hindi or both.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the post of Additional Assistant Engineer (Mechanical)?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies announced for the post of Additional Assistant Engineer (Mechanical), Class-3 in this recruitment drive by GSSSB.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for General and OBC categories. For SC/ST categories, the fee is also Nil. However, PwBD candidates need to pay Rs. 400, which is refundable if they appear for the exam.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for GSSSB AAE (Mechanical) recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes an MCQ CBRT/OMR Written Test and Document Verification. Candidates must perform well in both stages to be considered.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered for the Additional Assistant Engineer (Mechanical) post?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 49600 - 126600 Per Month. Additionally, a consolidated salary of Rs. 49600/- per month is provided for the first 5 years.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official GSSSB recruitment notification?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided in this article. It contains all detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for the GSSSB Additional Assistant Engineer (Mechanical) recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official GSSSB website or the provided application link between the start and end dates of the application period.
